title: The Woman Gives
writer: Grant Carpenter, Owen Johnson, Waldo Walker
actors: Norma Talmadge, John Halliday, Edmund Lowe
plot: Inga Sonderson an artist model and her sweetheart, sculptor Robert Milton, win recognition through the efforts of Daniel Garford, an artist of international fame. One day, upon returning home to find his wife in the arms of anothe...
